hooks.command: sh -c '[ -n "$AOE_INSTANCE_ID" ] || exit 0; mkdir -p /tmp/aoe-hooks/$AOE_INSTANCE_ID 2>/dev/null; printf running > /tmp/aoe-hooks/$AOE_INSTANCE_ID/status 2>/dev/null; exit 0'
